content:
Hello <@195401302145105920>!
It looks like the edifying tab is missing info from 80 to 90? Also the "Target Awakener Level" cell of the calculator only accepts values of 80 and below. If this is all intended dont mind me, thank you for the doc! <:other_cheers:1459073619622891635>

Yea, no worries this is intended functionality. When you get +8 and +12 you don't actually edify, the empty levels are just added to the unit.

That's why "Extra levels to add to cost is there" because it doesn't have to be levels 80-90, could be 60-70 or 70-80.

Target awakener levels only goes to 80 because it is there to calculate edifying costs. I couldn't really think if a cleaner way.

 So if for example you  did your first set of edifying on a +12 unit you would say Target of 70 and and Extra of 10 for level 80. The alternative was 10 checkboxes for each of the times you could edify.
Oooh yes I see, you consider 80 is the max and then the extra levels are a separate thing. Yeah makes total sense. Thanks for explaining it, and thank you again for the doc much appreciated! 😊
